warnings: Single-conformer result: every species was evaluated at ONE geometry, with no conformational/Boltzmann averaging. For a flexible molecule the Boltzmann-averaged free energy over conformers can differ from a single conformer by several kcal/mol — shifting pKa by >1 unit, E° by >0.1 V, and logP by >0.5. If the molecule has rotatable bonds, run conformer-search first and average, or treat this as a screening estimate tied to the input geometry.

prose:
Computed aqueous pKa (acid dissociation) of formic acid via an isodesmic “reference‐mode” calculation relative to acetic acid.

Method provenance block
Property: aqueous pKa (25 °C, 1 atm)
Level of theory: DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, RIJK) in PySCF 2.x
Geometry provenance: user-supplied single conformers (formic acid/ate and acetic acid/ate) evaluated as provided; no re-optimization requested (single-conformer warning surfaced). This is a single-point thermochemistry evaluation on the input geometries.
Solvent / environment: ddCOSMO implicit water (continuum only, no explicit H-bonding)
Charge & multiplicity: HA 0/1, A⁻ −1/1; reference HA 0/1, reference A⁻ −1/1
Mode: reference (isodesmic) with experimental anchor pKa(acetic acid) = 4.76
Convergence & caveats: all frequency jobs converged with zero genuine imaginary modes; see live *.out* logs for SCF/optimizer details. Density fitting (RIJK) used. Single-conformer approximation; DFT pKa estimates typically carry ±1 pKa-unit systematic uncertainty.

Headline result
pKa(formic acid, aqueous, 298 K) = 2.0012309

Live logs & files
Each species’ opt/frequency run streamed live to files like /tmp/chemkit_optfreq_f3kflk78/preopt.out (accessible for inspection). Result JSON: /var/folders/ym/_02kbfyd29z17l376783nlm00000gn/T/tmpb_b210fl/live.json. Optimized geometries are in the paths listed in the JSON.
